headline: Does Scrapping Supermajority Rules Reshape the Bull Case For Public Service Enterprise Group (PEG)?
summary: At its April 21, 2026 annual meeting, Public Service Enterprise Group stockholders approved amendments to the Certificate of Incorporation and By-Laws eliminating supermajority voting requirements for certain business combinations, director removals without cause, and specified by-law changes. This shift to simpler majority voting could meaningfully strengthen shareholder influence over future corporate actions, governance decisions, and potential transaction outcomes. Next, we will examine...
